content: Just as the linguistic definition of reflexion frames it as both the physical reflection of light and the deliberate cognitive act of反思 (self-reflection) in human learning, LLM self-reflection mechanisms can be redesigned to incorporate a dual function: mirroring the model’s existing outputs back to it (the 'reflection of light' function) and prompting deliberate critical reconsideration of those outputs to improve reasoning (the 'human self-reflection' function drawn from the linguistic origin of the term).
